category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split air-conditioners with heat-pump mode, residential and light-commercial, typically up to 40 kW rated capacity.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Egypt's EOS conformity certification framework, MGEA mandatory energy labelling and MEPS programme, EEAA refrigerant and ODS phasedown obligations, and ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40 electrical safety requirements administered by the Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS) and Egyptian Accreditation Council (EGAC).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与埃及EOS符合性认证框架、MGEA强制能效标签及MEPS计划、EEAA制冷剂及ODS削减义务，以及由埃及标准化与质量组织（EOS）和埃及认可委员会（EGAC）主管的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40电气安全要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與埃及EOS符合性認證框架、MGEA強制能效標籤及MEPS計劃、EEAA製冷劑及ODS削減義務，以及由埃及標準化與質量組織（EOS）和埃及認可委員會（EGAC）主管的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered conformity assessment body decision, EOS or EGAC filing, EEAA ODS permit, MGEA energy label approval, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current EOS conformity certificate scope, EGAC-accredited laboratory requirements, MGEA star-rating label format, MEPS thresholds, EEAA refrigerant import controls, and applicable ES standard editions with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation in Egypt.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、注册符合性评定机构决定、EOS或EGAC申报、EEAA ODS许可、MGEA能效标签批准、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在埃及出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行EOS符合性证书范围、EGAC认可实验室要求、MGEA星级标签格式、MEPS阈值、EEAA制冷剂进口管制及适用ES标准版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、註冊符合性評定機構決定、EOS或EGAC申報、EEAA ODS許可、MGEA能效標籤批准、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在埃及出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行EOS符合性證書範圍、EGAC認可實驗室要求、MGEA星級標籤格式、MEPS閾值、EEAA製冷劑進口管制及適用ES標準版本。

answer_first.en: Obtaining an EOS conformity certificate (with an EGAC-accredited lab test report to ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40), affixing the MGEA mandatory energy star-rating label, meeting Egypt's MEPS minimum EER thresholds, and confirming refrigerant compliance under EEAA's HCFC phasedown schedule are the major Egypt compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. China CCC is not recognised by EOS. Grid compatibility (220 V / 50 Hz) is excellent — no electrical re-engineering is required.
answer_first.zh: 获取EOS符合性证书（附EGAC认可实验室出具的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40测试报告）、加贴MGEA强制能效星级标签、满足埃及MEPS最低能效比（EER）阈值，以及按EEAA HCFC削减计划确认制冷剂合规，是中国空气源热泵进入埃及的主要合规差距。中国CCC不被EOS认可。电网兼容性良好（220 V / 50 Hz）——无需重新进行电气设计。
answer_first.zht: 獲取EOS符合性證書（附EGAC認可實驗室出具的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40測試報告）、加貼MGEA強制能效星級標籤、滿足埃及MEPS最低能效比（EER）閾值，以及按EEAA HCFC削減計劃確認製冷劑合規，是中國空氣源熱泵進入埃及的主要合規差距。中國CCC不被EOS認可。電網相容性良好（220 V / 50 Hz）——無需重新進行電氣設計。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon EOS / MGEA / EEAA regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verified flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. EOS, EGAC, EEAA, and MGEA official sources preferred; unconfirmed secondary sources must be flagged.
